title: Day 1: Open Counters
subtitle: Procedure still looks like a neutral surface.
objective: Speak with the four figures, collect the paper trace each interaction creates, then file the stack at the Records Window.
ambient_notice: Morning notice: standard civic services remain active with elevated verification latency.
public_address_fragments: Standard civic services remain active. Elevated verification should not be mistaken for refusal.
Documentation visibility improves processing continuity across all counters.
Queue calm contributes to administrative efficiency and reputational stability.
records_description: A narrow administrative aperture where lived experience is flattened into acceptable paper.
records_prompt: File the day's traces at the Records Window.
records_result: The clerk stamps each page without pausing over the sentence that hurt you.
apartment_prompt: Carry the filed day back into the apartment and see what remained of it.
turnstile_description: Home remains inaccessible until the archive finishes translating what happened to you.
turnstile_prompt: Locked. Day 1 still has to be filed.

title: Day 2: Managed Friction
subtitle: Yesterday's residue now returns as today's condition.
objective: Absorb the second-wave consequences, collect the revised documents, file them, then pass through the Home Turnstile.
ambient_notice: Morning notice: queue priority recalculated overnight. Compliance costs updated accordingly.
public_address_fragments: Overnight recalibration completed. Previously stable conditions may no longer apply.
Reduced certainty is part of the updated service architecture.
Domestic access now depends on synchronized records and revised priority status.
records_description: The archive now behaves less like memory and more like a forward-operating warning system.
records_prompt: File the second day's traces to close the record.
records_result: The archive accepts the revised stack as if it had predicted you all along.
turnstile_description: A domestic exit disguised as infrastructure. It opens only after your reduction has been made legible.
turnstile_prompt: Available only after Day 2 is filed.
